store_headline: WordPress Theme for Record Labels and Multi-Artist Rosters
store_subheadline: Manage and showcase your entire artist roster with discography, events, and music sales
features: Artist custom post type with profiles and media
Video gallery with custom player options
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Custom post meta options (likes, views, reading time)
selling_points: Wolf Artists plugin gives each roster artist their own releases, events, and video pages
Not a single-artist theme adapted for labels — built from the ground up for roster management
Clean institutional slab typography signals label credibility, not the visual noise of a band site
Individual artist pages link directly to their own discography, events, and video content
WooCommerce for label merchandise and music sales across the entire roster from one platform
Audio player with playlist management for showcasing releases across multiple artists
WPBakery-powered layout system for building label-specific pages without a developer
The institutional choice for labels that want credibility over drama — distinct from high-energy band themes
key_benefits: Manage your entire artist roster with per-artist profiles and media
Attract signings and industry partners with a clean institutional presence
Give every artist a linked profile page no single-artist theme can replicate
Sell label merch and music directly to fans through WooCommerce
Build a label site that makes A&R contacts take you seriously
Promote multiple artists' tours and releases from one events and discography system
Launch with the visual vocabulary of an established institution, not a band-site-turned-label
design_features: Custom music player with playlist support

testimonials.text: There's a reason why my label, my marketing agency, all of my artists, and soon – all of my venues, use Wolf-Themes… Why you'd use another template just means you're not serious about your music.
testimonials.author: BobbyJayOTA

testimonials.text: Use this theme as starting point for a summer weekend festival, till now all my needs are inside the configurable blocks. Support QnA is within one day, which helps my proceding on-time.
testimonials.author: StarSolutions

testimonials.text: Outstanding template, I really like it! You can use it in many ways and it's very flexible. The support is also amazing. I had a problem with a function and reached out to the author, so he just updated the theme. Thanks again! :)
testimonials.author: JSchmidti
